headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, massive metrics

mono.usage: Data tables, logs, JSON snippets, ID numbers

primary.name: Electric Cobalt
primary.usage: Primary actions, active states, key data points

card.style: rounded-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

button.primary: rounded-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-semibold shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95

input.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-fr

split_view.usage: Document review page (Left: PDF Preview, Right: Extraction Form)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-slate-500 is not used on dark backgrounds without verification

general: Implement a toggle for Light/Dark mode in the top navigation bar.
Ensure all charts (Recharts) are responsive and use the defined palette colors.
For the 'Review' page, use a split-pane layout with the document on the left and form on the right.
Use 'Skeleton' loaders for all data-fetching states.
dashboard_specifics: The dashboard should use the 'Bento Grid' layout.
Top cards: Summary metrics (Total Docs, Success Rate, Processing Time).
Middle section: Charts (Docs over time, Success vs Failure).
workflow_page: Implement as a multi-step wizard: Config -> Upload -> Mode -> Run.
Use a real-time log viewer component (simulated or real websocket) with auto-scroll.
file_handling: Use 'react-dropzone' or similar for file uploads (if available, else standard input).
Display file size and type validation errors using Sonner.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
Use 'data-testid' for all key actionable elements.
